stories.title: Base setup — design system, fonts, color palette, global styles
stories.description: As a developer, I need the foundational design tokens and global styles so that all subsequent stories share a cohesive visual language.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette defined as CSS variables: sandy white #FAF7F2, turquoise #4ECDC4, warm sand #E8D5B7, deep sea #1A3A4A, soft stone #8B7355
Google Fonts loaded: Playfair Display (headings) + Inter (body)
Global reset and base styles applied (box-sizing, font smoothing, scroll-behavior: smooth)
App.jsx renders a root <main> with placeholder NaabHaus text
Lint passes

stories.title: Language context — EN/IT toggle
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to switch between English and Italian so that I can read the site in my preferred language.
acceptanceCriteria: LanguageContext React context created with lang state ('en' | 'it')
useTranslation hook or helper that returns the correct string given a key and current lang
translations.js file with EN and IT strings for every section (placeholder copy)
Toggle button (EN / IT) visible in the navbar, switches language globally
All existing text on the page switches language instantly without page reload
Selected language persists in localStorage
Lint passes

stories.title: Navbar
stories.description: As a visitor, I want a clean top navigation bar so that I can jump to any section and switch language.
acceptanceCriteria: Fixed/sticky navbar with logo text NaabHaus on the left
Nav links: Home, Features, Gallery, Experience, Location, Book Now
Clicking a nav link smoothly scrolls to the corresponding section
Language toggle (EN/IT) on the right
Navbar background transitions from transparent (over hero) to white/frosted on scroll
Mobile: collapses to hamburger menu
Lint passes

stories.title: Hero section
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to be immediately captivated by a stunning hero so that I feel emotionally drawn to the property.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-viewport hero with a large placeholder image (use a high-quality Unsplash URL for Sardegna/Mediterranean)
Subtle dark overlay for text legibility
Headline in Playfair Display (EN: 'Your home by the Sardinian sea' / IT: 'La tua casa sul mare di Sardegna')
Subheadline with atmosphere text (EN/IT)
Primary CTA button linking to bookingUrl placeholder
Fade-in animation on load (headline, subheadline, CTA stagger in)
Lint passes

stories.title: Features/highlights section
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to see the property's key features at a glance so that I understand what makes it special.
acceptanceCriteria: Section with heading 'The home' / 'La casa'
Grid of 6 feature cards, each with an icon (emoji or SVG), title, and short description (EN/IT): Sleeps 8, Private pool, Sea view terrace, 200m from beach, Full kitchen, Free parking
Cards fade in on scroll using Intersection Observer
Responsive: 3 cols desktop, 2 cols tablet, 1 col mobile
Lint passes

stories.title: Gallery section
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse beautiful photos of the property and surroundings so that I can imagine myself there.
acceptanceCriteria: Section with heading 'Gallery' / 'Galleria'
Masonry or asymmetric CSS grid layout with 8-10 placeholder images (Unsplash: Sardegna interiors, sea, terrace, beach)
Images have a subtle hover zoom effect (transform scale + overflow hidden)
Lightbox: clicking an image opens a full-screen overlay with the image and close button (press Escape or click X to close)
Fade-in on scroll for the grid
Responsive: fluid grid that collapses gracefully on mobile
Lint passes

stories.title: Experience/lifestyle section
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to feel the atmosphere of staying at the property so that I emotionally connect with the place.
acceptanceCriteria: Section with 3 alternating image + text blocks
Block 1: 'Mornings on the terrace' / 'Mattine in terrazza' — image left, text right
Block 2: 'Sunsets by the sea' / 'Tramonti sul mare' — text left, image right
Block 3: 'The charm of Sardinia' / 'Il fascino della Sardegna' — image left, text right
Each block has a Playfair Display heading, atmospheric paragraph (EN/IT)
Slide-in animation on scroll (image and text from opposite sides)
Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile
Lint passes

stories.title: Location section
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to know where the property is and what's nearby so that I can plan my trip.
acceptanceCriteria: Section with heading 'Where we are' / 'Dove siamo'
Short atmospheric description of the area (EN/IT placeholder copy)
List of nearby highlights with distances: Beach 200m, Nearest village 3km, Olbia Airport 45 min, Porto Cervo 30 min
Embedded Google Maps iframe (placeholder coords: 41.1N, 9.5E — generic Sardegna)
Fade-in on scroll
Lint passes

stories.title: Footer + booking CTA
stories.description: As a visitor, I want a clear final call-to-action and footer so that I know how to book and can find contact info.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-width CTA banner above footer with booking button linking to bookingUrl
CTA banner EN: 'Ready to escape?' / IT: 'Pronto a fuggire?' with button 'Book on Airbnb' / 'Prenota su Airbnb'
CTA banner uses turquoise or deep sea background color
Footer with: logo, short tagline (EN/IT), nav links, email placeholder, copyright
Footer background: deep sea #1A3A4A, text white
Lint passes

stories.title: Scroll animations & final polish
stories.description: As a visitor, I want smooth, subtle animations throughout the page so that the experience feels refined and luxurious.
acceptanceCriteria: Reusable FadeIn component using Intersection Observer that wraps any section child
Subtle parallax effect on hero image
Scroll progress indicator (thin turquoise line at top of page)
All sections have consistent generous vertical spacing (min 6rem padding)
Full mobile responsiveness verified across all sections
No console errors in production build (vite build passes)
Lint passes
